work_unit: sync confidence threshold tables across 3 docs to decision-agent-prompt.md v2.2 authority
situation: AE2-H-003 (audit-2026-07-02-007): CLAUDE.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, decision-agent-prompt.md each defined mutually exclusive confidence threshold mappings. Sub-agent reads decision-agent-prompt.md as its operating manual, but users/maintainers reading CLAUDE.md see a different table. ARCHITECTURE.md SUGGEST range was 11-30 vs 31-59 in authority — off by an order of magnitude in coverage.
action: Added authority-source declaration to top of decision-agent-prompt.md. Replaced CLAUDE.md §信心分级 table with v2.2 reversible-operation tier + pointer to authority. Replaced ARCHITECTURE.md confidence table with same v2.2 mapping + pointer. All three now consistent and self-delegating.
outcome_evidence: Commit b39d6f2 pushed to origin/auto/opt-autonomous-engine-1782975771. opt-worktree.sh confirmed route-fix reuse (no public-interface touch). Three files modified in single commit; diff shows table replacement + authority note addition.

audit_findings.remediation: Replaced with v2.2 reversible-tier summary + authority pointer

audit_findings.remediation: Replaced with v2.2 reversible-tier summary + authority pointer
